source_name: ZTF public alert archive (University of Washington)
cadence: ZTF source survey uses ~3-night all-sky cadence; this sample was pulled via `Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py --nights 3` (most-recent-N-nights at download time), but the exact calendar nights were not separately logged and cannot be recovered from the cached file
band_or_frequency: ZTF g/r/i filters; per-alert filter band not preserved in this cached sample
data_product_type: difference-image alert cutout triplets (science/reference/difference, base64-encoded FITS) with ZTF broker real/bogus (rb) and deep-learning real/bogus (drb) scores
downloaded_at: 2026-06-06T10:42:55-0400 (local filesystem mtime of data/ztf_labeled_alerts.json; no separate download-timestamp log exists)
license: Not independently verified in project records. ZTF public alert archive (ztf.uw.edu) provides unauthenticated public HTTP access; no explicit license file or terms-of-use document was located during Gate Z3 source verification (docs/evidence/phase0/2026-07-02-gate-z3-uw-alert-archive-candidate.md) or during this manifest's creation.
label_source: ZTF broker-side real/bogus classifier (Duev et al. 2019 style rb/drb scores), binarized by Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py into this dataset's real/bogus label
preprocessing_version: Skills/download_ztf_training_alerts.py (gzip-FITS cutouts decompressed to raw float32); consumed by Skills/build_cutout_dataset.py to build data/cutouts/index.csv for models/tier2_cnn.pt training
known_caveats: This is the real, committed-code-produced source for the frozen benchmark_cnn_v1 model's training data, but the raw file itself is gitignored/local-only (637MB) and is not in git history.

No per-alert RA/Dec/JD/candid/field metadata was preserved when this file was built -- only label, rb, drb, and cutout images per entry (10,000 alerts total, confirmed by direct inspection 2026-07-10).

This means a genuine grouped-split leakage report (by night/sky-cell/source, per A4) cannot be reconstructed for this dataset without either re-deriving the original per-alert metadata from the ZTF source archive (if still resolvable) or retraining with a data path that captures it going forward -- this is an acquisition/retraining decision, not a coding gap.
Real class balance per docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md T1-A: approximately 8,588 real / 1,412 bogus across the 10,000 alerts.
The exact `--nights` value's calendar date range at download time is not recoverable from the cached file or from git history (the raw file predates being gitignored and has no commit log).
